title: SRO 172 DATED 13 APR 1987
text: TO BE PUBLISHED IN PART II/SECTION IV OF THE GAZETTE OF INDIA MINISTRY OF DEFENCE CORRIGENDUM New Delhi 13th April 1987 S.R.O. 172 in the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Defence No. S.R.O. 20(E) dated the 12th November, 1986 publication in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, Section 4 on the 12th November, 1986 :- (1) in rule 2, in clause (b), in second line, “Navika” read “Navik”; (2) in rule 4, in sub-rule (3), in first line, for “are” read “an”; (3) in rule 5, in third line, for “case” read “cause”; (4) in rule 6, in the heading, for “services” read “service”; (5) in rule 19, in sub-rule (2), in fifth line, for “knowldege” read “knowledge”; (6) in rule 19, in sub-rule (8), in second line, for “ematted” read “entailed”; (7) in rule 19, in sub-rule (9), in first line, for “Sub-rules” read “sub-rules”; (8) in rule 27, in sub-rule (1),in clause (a), in eleventh line, for “services” read “service”; (9) in rule 28, in sub-rule (1), in fifth line, for “mainttnance” read “maintenance”; (10) in rule 29, in sub-rule (3), in second line, for “shall communicate” read “shall be communicated”; (11) in rule 31, in sub-rule (2), in fourth line, for “which a person has been out of service” read “imprisonment, detention, desertion”; (12) in rule 34, in second and third lines, for “of the second or third badge, as the case may fied” read “or deferment-(1) when a person is qualified”; (13) in rule 34, in sub-rule (6), in seventh line, for “betn” read been”; (14) in rule 39, in sub-rule (2), in seventh line, for “wihout” read “without”; (15) in rule 40, in sub-rule (2), in first line, for “Vary” read “very”; (16) in rule 41, in sub-rule (a), in second line, for “in” read “is”; (17) in rule 54, in sub-rule (5), in second line, for “tenance of his wife or legitimate or illegitimate” read “damage or destruction of any government property”; (18) in rule 56, in sub-rule (1), in seventh line, for “person” read “personal”; (19) in rule 56, in sub-rule (4), in penultimate and last lines, for “at-tendance” read “attendance”; -- 1 of 3 -- (20) in rule 56, in sub-rule (8), in second line, for “of” read “or”; (21) in rule 56, in sub-rule (8), in twelfth line, for “prejutice” read “prejudice”; (22) in rule 58 and before the Table read the heading “Annexure” and in the Annexure, for “Strip” substitute “Ship”. CGHQ No. LW/0219 (K. Srinivasan) Joint Secretary (Navy) PUBLISH D(Coord), (K. Srinivasan) Ministry of Defence Joint Secretary (Navy) OM of D.I.D No. LW/0219/1017/D(N-III)/87, dated 13/4/97 -- 2 of 3 -- -- 3 of 3 --
